Game.Name: Rushing Beat Shura (Japan)
Game.plot: The Peace Keepers is an Action game, developed and published by Jaleco Entertainment,which was released in Japan in 1993.Cheat: Secret CharacterIf you go up to the door at the end of the first stage without going in, then return to the beginning, you will find a secret character: Douglas Bild / Oozie Nelson from an earlier Jaleco title, "Rushing Beat" (the other character, Rick Norton / Jack Flack, is playable in this game). Douglas will apologize for not being able to help fight the Deutchland Moldavia (DM) corporation.Cheat: Secret CharacterIf you go up to the door at the end of the Roy D Tutto Hospital stage without going in, then return to the manhole you passed in the street, you will find it is open. It is a shorcut to the Stalag 17 stageCheat: Secret CharacterIf you play as Prokop up to the Ozymandias stage, then play as any other character on that stage, Prokop will be killed when you go down the flight of stairs.
